title: Waifu Villagers: Curvy
description: Waifu Villagers revamps Minecraft villagers with charming, stylized models and eye-catching new designs for a more lively and playful world.
body:
# Summary

Transform your plain Minecraft villagers! This pack gives them charming, stylized models and lets you rename them for a more lively and personalized village. Add personality, flair, and a fresh look to every NPC you meet.

![Studio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b82cd864767ec1e830be365eb595c9f9b44ca92e.png)

# This texture pack requires:
- [OptiFine mod](https://optifine.net/home) for _forge_
- [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) mods for _fabric_
